Documentation for code that supports alternative Flask implementations without IO or Flask globals.

# Purpose
The `Sansio` folder contains code designed for use by alternative Flask implementations, such as Quart. The code in this folder does not perform any input/output operations and is not part of any input/output path. Additionally, it does not use Flask globals.
